title: Add Okta SSO support
description: Add Okta support for SAML-based SSO so enterprise customers can authenticate through their existing identity provider.
acceptance_criteria: Admins can configure Okta as an identity provider
Users can sign in through Okta SSO
SSO configuration errors are surfaced clearly

title: Add audit logging for SSO login events
description: Record audit events for successful and failed SSO login attempts so internal teams can investigate authentication activity.

title: Improve SSO callback error handling
description: Improve error handling for invalid SAML responses and expired SSO callback requests during enterprise SSO login.
